case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS DONALDO MONTES TREJO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TREJO, LUIS DONALDO MONTES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TREJO, LUIS DONALDO MONTES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-06-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED NOV-05-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-06-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-06-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTED BY PRICILLA TOVAR, COLLECTION SPECIALTIST. DEFENDANT DONALDO MONTES TREJO DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.
